title: Add mandatory world snapshot and inventory truth before planning
description: Before any new plan is generated, collect a fresh world snapshot (nearby blocks, nearby entities, status) and reconcile inventory from authoritative adapter events. This closes the stale-world-state gap called out by the audits and should be enforced as a prerequisite for planning. Source: Data/Pages/Audits/sprint-56-wave-b-audit.md and Data/Pages/Audits/MemorySmith_Agent_Commit5af0d74_Audit_and_PlanningArchitecture_2026-06-30.md.
